title: Manufacturing Engineer - Nestle India International Enterprises - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Nestle India International Enterprises - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
We at Nestle India International Enterprises are looking for an experienced Manufacturing Engineer based out of Jodhpur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Nestle India International Enterprises:
Nestle India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nestle India International Enterprises!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
